violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Store wiping cloths in sanitizer solution between uses. Recommend using single service towels if using spray bottle sanitizer.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Operate as follows: 1) Hot soapy water 2) Clear water rinse 3) Sanitizing rinse (50-100 ppm chlorine) 4) Air dry all utensils
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Rest room door held open with fan blowing into drink prep area.
